You shall have power . . . in the demonstration of my Holy Spirit. The gospel is a living thing, not simply a list of precepts. When Paul began preaching in Thessalonica, he taught for three straight Sabbaths in the synagogue (Acts 17:2-3). Those in attendance included Jews who had previously been scattered into Gentile lands and those native Macedonians who had been raised to believe in all of the Greek Gods.
